description_long: This is a stylized rifle with a vivid magenta and pink camouflage pattern covering its entire body, including the stock, receiver, handguard, and barrel. The rifle features a fixed stock and a curved detachable box magazine, both of which are integrated seamlessly into the design. The handguard and receiver are adorned with white text and graphic elements, adding a modern, urban flair to the weapon. The barrel is standard length and fitted with a simple front sight post, while the rear sight is also visible, indicating the use of iron sights. The surface finish appears glossy, reflecting light and enhancing the bold coloration. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical for modern rifles.
description: A magenta and pink camouflaged rifle with a fixed stock, curved magazine, and iron sights, featuring a glossy finish and urban graphic details.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from a front-left angle, highlighting the barrel, front sight, and the start of the handguard with its vibrant pink camouflage.
description_view_1: A clear left-side profile shows the full length of the rifle, the fixed stock, curved magazine, and prominent white graphics on the receiver.
description_view_2: A rearward view down the length of the rifle emphasizes the stock, receiver, and the alignment of the iron sights along the top.
description_view_3: The right-side profile displays the fixed stock, curved magazine, and the continuation of the magenta camouflage pattern with visible text and graphics.
